name: To find her
short_description: 《寻踪》is an immersive adventure puzzle game with simple controls, perfect for beginners. ,crack codes, solve literary puzzles, and evade capture. With over 10 gameplay elements and a micro-horror atmosphere, the game offers a thrilling experience as you uncover the truth behind a girl's disappearance.
detailed_description:
"寻踪" —— A Sincere Invitation to Adventurers

Dear Adventurer,

Greetings!

This is a sincere invitation from an independent university developer, crafted at a small desk.

In this game, "寻踪" which I have meticulously developed , you will embark on a composite adventure filled with surprises. Even if you have never experienced a puzzle game before, you can start your journey within five minutes through intuitive operations—move freely with the directional keys, rotate the view by swiping your finger, press the E key to interact, and pick up items with a gentle touch.

Behind these simple operations lies a rich and fascinating adventure interwoven with diverse gameplay. It is not so much a game of a specific genre but rather a grand medley of various gameplay elements: leaping through dark caves, uncovering anomalies in the midnight city, cracking four-digit electronic locks, solving poetry puzzles that test your literary knowledge, and infiltrating the perilous jungle... Over ten types of gameplay are blended into this digital hodgepodge. Unleash your imagination and creativity, discover patterns, and utilize them. Each puzzle you solve will illuminate a new fragment of the storyline.

Gradually, you will uncover the secrets behind the town's disappearances, confront the unfathomable depths of human nature, and ultimately rescue your beloved girl. Amidst sudden thrills and well-paced tension, you will experience just the right amount of immersive micro-horror—like the spine-tingling yet irresistible sensation of reading a detective novel alone in the dead of night.

I especially recommend wearing headphones: the pitter-patter of rain on a small window, the gentle babble of cave streams, and the increasingly rapid heartbeat during a chase. These hundreds of meticulously crafted 3D sound effects will truly transport you into this fantastical adventure woven from code.

As a second-year student who completed the entire development on a computer with only an integrated graphics card due to limited financial resources, I am well aware that the game cannot be made Flawless. If there is anything that disappoints you, I offer my sincerest apologies. But when you hear the distant footsteps of a pursuer or discover a key hidden above a beam, perhaps you can sense the developer who was debugging collision volumes at three in the morning, smiling back at you through the screen.

If you encounter any issues during the game, or have any valuable suggestions, please feel free to contact the developer through the communication channels on the page. Every piece of feedback can make the game better, and your moments of inspiration and joy in solving puzzles are the best rewards for the creator.

Are you ready? Under the dim light of a rainy night, is someone watching you from the shadows?

Welcome!

Developer
